rag_rules: Fix unresolved references or invalid expressions in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible and properly typed.
When AGREE reports type mismatches, align helper declarations with the correct scalar types: int, real, or bool.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must use only visible identifiers and valid scalar types; avoid introducing undefined or mismatched types.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings and assignments.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Helper declarations must match the type of the expression they define.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Do not reference identifiers or types that are unresolved or mismatched in the AGREE contract.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component implementation bindings and subcomponent ports
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
